# vendor/bootstrap/css/

## Purpose
Contains the minified Bootstrap v5.3.3 CSS stylesheet used across all Neuron extension UI surfaces.

## Functionality
Delivers the full Bootstrap 5 design system: layout (grid, flexbox utilities), typography, form controls, buttons, modals, dropdowns, alerts, badges, and all other Bootstrap components. Loaded via `<link>` tags in the extension's HTML pages and injected stylesheets.

## Key Files
- `bootstrap.min.css` — Bootstrap v5.3.3 minified stylesheet (Copyright 2011-2024 The Bootstrap Authors, MIT License).

## Dependencies
No external file dependencies. Self-contained stylesheet.
